text:
Expected: SKILL.md step 5 tells the author to run the headless validator (assets/validate.mjs) on the generated report, so a leftover {{placeholder}}, a section-badge gap, or a TOC/section-order mismatch is caught before shipping.
Actual: step 5 lists only manual eyeball checks and invokes nothing runnable, so a malformed plan-deck can ship unnoticed even though a validator now exists.
suggestedCriterion: SKILL.md references assets/validate.mjs and instructs running it in the verify step.

text:
Expected: the honesty rules in references/components.md govern the new 'Decisions you'll revisit first' lead block the same way they govern open questions — list only genuine soft spots, omit the section if there are none.
Actual: the honesty-rules section has no bullet for the decisions lead, so an author can pad it with manufactured decisions to fill the section.
suggestedCriterion: components.md honesty rules include a bullet governing the decisions lead (real decisions only; omit if none).
